description: regreSSHion: signal-handler race in sshd enables unauthenticated remote code execution as root on glibc-based Linux (affects 8.5p1 up to <9.8p1).
iconv ISO-2022-CN-EXT out-of-bounds write (glibc 2.39 and older); can crash or enable code execution.
Heap buffer over-read/overflow in inflate() via a large gzip header extra field (fixed in 1.2.13).
